text:
Prediction: No
Reasoning: The patient's current hospital visit record shows a complex array of diagnoses, including Acute kidney failure with lesion of tubular necrosis, Methicillin susceptible pneumonia due to Staphylococcus aureus, Congestive heart failure, unspecified, Acute and chronic respiratory failure, Obstructive chronic bronchitis with (acute) exacerbation, Infection with microorganisms resistant to penicillins, Unspecified essential hypertension, and Coronary atherosclerosis of native coronary artery. The patient is receiving extensive supportive care, including Metoclopramide, Famotidine, Iso-Osmotic Sodium Chloride, Ipratropium Bromide Neb, Albuterol Neb Soln, Vitamin D, Calcium Acetate, 1/2 NS, Sodium Bicarbonate, Hydralazine HCl, Nifedipine, Atorvastatin, Docusate Sodium, Senna, Miconazole Powder 2%, Levofloxacin, Furosemide, Diltiazem, Alteplase (Catheter Clearance), Gabapentin, Diltiazem Extended-Release, Heparin, Acetaminophen, Salmeterol Xinafoate Diskus (50 mcg), Fluticasone Propionate 110mcg, D5W, Vancomycin HCl, Naloxone
